text: Moving from the bright hallway into this immersive room, I am drawn to the vivid colors and thoughtful design. The wall reads: 'R+D. Responsive and rapidly evolving Development space showcasing research…' The air within feels charged with inquiry, alive with possibility. There is an invitation here—an openness to ambiguity and innovation, echoed in the poetic text flickering across the screens. I feel a sense of curiosity as if I stand on the threshold between order and creative chaos. In this space, the unknown is celebrated rather than feared, and I am quietly excited to participate in this unfolding experiment.
